mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_enrollment (enrollment_id, student_id, course_id, semester, enroll_time, status, weight, round) VALUES (#{enrollmentId}, #{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{semester}, #{enrollTime}, #{status}, #{weight}, #{round})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_enrollment SET status=#{status}, weight=#{weight} WHERE enrollment_id=#{enrollmentId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_enrollment WHERE student_id=#{studentId} ORDER BY enroll_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_enrollment WHERE course_id=#{courseId} ORDER BY enroll_time
mapper.update: UPDATE t_enrollment SET status=#{status} WHERE enrollment_id=#{enrollmentId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_enrollment WHERE course_id=#{courseId} AND status='已选'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_enrollment WHERE student_id=#{studentId} AND course_id=#{courseId}
